mission.title: weaviate: [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or cli args set
mission.description: [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or cli args set. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current weaviate deployment
steps.description:
Verify your weaviate version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
helm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working weaviate installation.

steps.title: Review weaviate configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate
```
It should then pick reasonable defaults for everything.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or…
steps.description:
### What's being changed:

### Review checklist
```yaml
export PERSISTENCE_DATA_PATH="./data"
export AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED="true"
./weaviate --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --scheme http
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/pull/3473

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with weaviate installed or the issue environment reproducible.
